title: waf-assessor inputs
description: Typed inputs for the waf-assessor runtime agent. Machine-readable mirror of the Inputs table in AGENT.md. The harness validates caller-supplied input packets against this schema before the agent begins work; validation failures surface the offending field to the caller rather than failing mid-run.

workload.description: Example from AGENT.md: `"sales cloud + CPQ + agentforce"` Required column: 'yes'.

nfrs.description: Example from AGENT.md: JSON: `{ "availability": "99.9%", "rpo_hours": 4 }` Required column: 'no'.

scope_pillars.description: Example from AGENT.md: default: all 5; subset allowed Required column: 'no'.
